CheckTitle: Ensure agent identities and blueprints have descriptions
Description: Checks that agent identities and blueprints have a description or informational URL set. Missing metadata makes governance review and incident response harder.
Risk: Agent identities without descriptions or documentation create a governance gap. During incident response, responders cannot quickly determine the agent's purpose, owner, or intended scope.

Remediation.Recommendation: Add a description to the agent identity or blueprint via PATCH. Include the agent's purpose, intended scope, and contact information in the info property.

SourceNotes: Description and info properties are inherited from application/servicePrincipal.
